case_title: HARRIGAN, WEIDENMULLER CO. VS. EFRAIN KHALFY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIGAN, WEIDENMULLER CO. AS TO DEFENDANT KHALFY, EFRAIN LAWRENCE GALLERY & FINE ARTS, INC. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-08-2009 10:00 AM FOR DEPT 218
COURT TRIAL ON SEP-08-2009 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRIGAN, WEIDENMULLER CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHALFY, EFRAIN LAWRENCE GALLERY & FINE ARTS, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2631 TAYLOR ST., #103, SAN FRANCISCO. $70,302.16 RENT, $3,700.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $400.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $74,402.16, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as assigned by the Presiding Judge Dept. (#206) for Court Trial/ Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Joseph Tursi, Esq. for Plaintiff: Harrigan, Weidenmuller Co.
Plaintiff's Witness Brian Muller was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Efrain Khalfhy and Lawrence Gallery & Fine Arts, Inc. as follows:
Possession of the premises located at 2631 Taylor St., #103, San Francisco, CA. 94133
Lease is forfeited.
Past-due Rent $70,302.16
Attorney's Fees $3,700.00
Costs $400.00, for a total of $74,402.16
Judgment signed in open court.
